update.name: CVE-2026-31431-Metasploit-exploit
update.description: Automated Metasploit post-exploitation module for CVE-2026-31431 ("Copy Fail"). Weaponizes a deterministic logic flaw in the Linux kernel AF_ALG subsystem to achieve local privilege escalation (LPE) to root by safely corrupting a setuid binary directly in the shared Page Cache (RAM) without modifying files on disk
